result.goal: Improve overall fitness, strength, and endurance
result.seo_title: 4-Week Intermediate Workout Plan for Strength and Endurance
result.seo_content: Elevate your fitness with this 4-week intermediate workout plan designed to build strength, endurance, and overall health. Featuring foundational exercises like squats, deadlifts, and presses, this plan fits a schedule of three sessions per week, each lasting approximately 60 minutes. Perfect for those looking to progress beyond beginner workouts and achieve balanced fitness.
result.seo_keywords: intermediate workout plan, 4-week fitness program, strength training, endurance workout, full-body exercises
